themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. themes.label: Worship
themes.summary: This chapter gives prominence to praise, worship, thanksgiving, or blessing God’s name. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Moreover I will cause to cease in Moab, saith the LORD, him that offereth in the high places...". Word-study detail reinforces "תְּהִלַּ֣ת: There shall be no more praise - laudation; specifically (concretely) a hymn".

themes.label: Suffering

themes.label: Faith/Belief
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes trust, belief, confidence, or steadfast reliance on God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Moab shall be ashamed of Chemosh (וּבֹשׁ מוֹאָב מִכְּמוֹשׁ)— Kemosh was Moab's national deity...". Cross references echo "Faith".
